name: Joe Bonamassa
abstract: Joseph Leonard Bonamassa ( BAH-nə-MAH-sə; born May 8, 1977) is an American blues rock guitarist, singer and songwriter. He started his career at age twelve, when he opened for B.B.

concerts.label: An Acoustic Evening with Joe Bonamassa
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
